findings.title: Reuses an existing protobuf field number for a different wire type
findings.impact: RegisterClientRspPb field 24 was previously an int32 log_rate_limit and is now a LogSampleConfigPb message. During mixed-version client/worker deployments, protobuf readers see the known field with the wrong wire type and drop it as unknown, so the worker sampling policy is silently not applied to clients.
findings.fix: Do not reuse field 24. Reserve the old log_rate_limit tag and add log_sample_config on a new tag, then update the sender/receiver and tests to use the new field number.
